summary: Backend API testing completed for bug fixes. 18/18 tests passed (100%). All 4 bug fixes verified working: Admin Change Role, Floor Events, Late Meals Edit, and User Login for new accounts.

admin_change_role.details: Successfully changes user role. Tested: student→ra→student. Invalid roles rejected (400). Non-admins denied (403).

floor_events.details: Events model includes floor and event_type fields. 5 events with floor field, 1 with event_type. Floor events can be created with floor='Level 1 - Wing A' and event_type='floor'.

late_meals_get.details: Admin sees all 7 late meal requests. Returns id, student_id, student_name, meal_type, date, reason, dietary_requirements, status, created_at.

late_meals_edit.details: Users can edit their own pending late meals. Admin can edit any user's late meal request.

user_login_estherf.details: estherf@icloud.com / Purple1! - login successful, role: student

user_login_emeliaf.details: emeliaf@icloud.com / Maroon1! - login successful, role: student

super_admin_login.details: gen@quadley.app / Quadley2025! - login successful, role: super_admin

ra_login.details: epink@icloud.com / AbC!123! - login successful, role: ra

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id} endpoint correctly validates roles and permissions
✓ Event model includes floor and event_type fields (models.py lines 196-197, 210-211)
✓ Events creation saves floor and event_type fields (events.py lines 84-85)
✓ Late meals PUT endpoint allows admin to edit any request (dining.py lines 103-105)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working. Admin Change Role endpoint at PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id} works correctly. Floor events can be created with floor and event_type fields. Late meals can be edited via PUT /api/dining/late-meals/{id}. Both new user accounts (estherf@icloud.com, emeliaf@icloud.com) can login successfully.
